title: 开发 App 时为了调研竞品，我做了个 AI 评论分析扩展
content: A developer created a lightweight browser extension for analyzing app store reviews when existing SaaS platforms proved too expensive for individual use. The tool automatically aggregates and semantically clusters comments from App Store and Google Play using AI, extracting structured signals about user complaints and feature requests with severity ratings and typical examples. Built with WXT, Vue 3, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, it operates locally via user's own OpenAI or Anthropic API keys and displays results directly on store pages. The creator also uses it to monitor their own app's feedback.

title: 刚刚，Fable 5官宣永久可用
content: Anthropic announced Claude Fable 5 will remain permanently available, reversing its planned removal. Starting July 20, Fable 5 will be included in Max and Team Premium subscriptions at 50% quota, while Pro and Team Standard users receive $100 credits. The reversal follows competitive pressure from OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launch and Moonshot AI's Kimi K3, which offers superior performance at less than one-third Fable 5's API price. The article suggests Chinese AI models are challenging American companies' high-premium pricing strategies.

title: 真正让人变通透、有智慧的15个底层习惯
content: This article presents 15 daily habits for cultivating wisdom and mental clarity, emphasizing that intelligence stems from consistent practice rather than innate talent. Key habits include reading classic literature, walking without distractions, daily writing for self-reflection, embracing solitude, disabling notifications, rewriting negative self-narratives, practicing gratitude, expressing emotions honestly, maintaining curiosity, periodic digital detoxes, accepting spontaneity, minimalist living, engaging in deep conversations with elders, and embracing uncertainty. The author stresses that wisdom grows through sustained effort and humility, citing Socrates' acknowledgment of ignorance as the foundation of true understanding.

title: “韩国最好的夏天”：120万人爆仓，巨亏940万亿
content: South Korea's semiconductor-driven stock bubble burst in under a month in mid-2026. After SK Hynix and Samsung surged—making employees millionaires and drawing millions of leveraged retail investors—KOSPI crashed 25% from its record 9,114 peak. Over 1.2 million margin accounts faced margin calls; 360,000 were forcibly liquidated, mostly under-30s who borrowed to invest. The two giants lost 940 trillion won ($4.3 trillion) in combined value. The government had fueled speculation through tax cuts, short-selling bans, pension fund stock purchases, and approval of 2x leveraged single-stock ETFs. This marks Korea's latest cycle of speculative mania following the 1999 tech bubble, 2020 "Donghak Ants" retail frenzy, and 2022 Luna crypto collapse, as young Koreans treat high-risk trading as their only remaining path to mobility amid stagnant wages
eventKey: “韩国最好的夏天”-120万人爆仓-巨亏940万亿

title: 门票炒到 3000 元的 WAIC，我们找到了 AI 真正的创新
content: The 2026 WAIC in Shanghai expanded to four venues with over 1,100 exhibitors and 3,000 products, reflecting AI's shift from impressive demos to practical deployment. Key trends include embodied intelligence entering factories and homes through industrial robots, consumer robot dogs, and household assistants; hardware being redesigned around AI agents, such as all-day earphones and smartphones rebuilt for intelligent task execution; and models competing on reasoning cost, long-term memory, and physical-world understanding rather than parameters alone. Enterprises focused on delivering reliable, measurable outcomes—whether in manufacturing, healthcare, creative tools, or local-edge computing—signaling AI's maturation into a utility that must prove real-world value.
eventKey: 门票炒到-3000-waic-我们找到了-真正的创新
normalizedTitle: 门票炒到 3000 元的 waic 我们找到了 ai 真正的创新

title: 40元的网红蛋糕，一年关店180家
content: Chinese "luxury" bakery brands KUMO KUMO and the Roll'ING are rapidly shrinking after brief viral success. KUMO KUMO closed over 180 stores in one year, leaving just 56 operating; the Roll'ING closed nearly 60, with 31 remaining. Both relied on single products (cheesecake, Swiss rolls), eye-catching packaging, and manufactured scarcity through long lines and purchase limits. After expanding via franchising into lower-tier cities, they failed to sustain momentum due to insufficient product innovation, low repurchase rates for non-essential expensive desserts, competition from cheaper supermarket alternatives, and rampant copycat brands. High rents in prime locations became unsustainable as customer traffic declined.
eventKey: 40元的网红蛋糕-一年关店180家
normalizedTitle: 40元的网红蛋糕 一年关店180家

title: 打败Fable 5！Kimi K3冲上第一，杨植麟导师很骄傲
content: Kimi K3, a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-source AI model with native vision support and 1-million-token context window, launched on July 17 as China's largest open-source release. It ranks first in Vercel's web engineering benchmark, surpassing closed-source models like Claude Fable 5 in coding tasks with 92% success rate, while costing significantly less. The model demonstrates advanced agentic capabilities, completing complex workflows like chip design, GPU optimization, research synthesis, and video editing. Key architectural upgrades include Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals, improving long-sequence processing efficiency by 2.5x. Weights release scheduled for July 27.
eventKey: 打败fable-kimi-k3冲上第一-杨植麟导师很骄傲

content: Apple regained the title of world's most valuable company, surpassing Nvidia. title: 2026 07 18 HackerNews
content: A Kaggle competitor publicly challenged DeepMind's evaluation process for a $25,000 prize, citing inconsistencies and poor academic integrity in the winning submission. Two AI models tested autonomous music video creation on $25-$100 budgets produced usable but mediocre results with significant cost and tool-usage differences between them. Apple sent legal letters to dozens of OpenAI employees to protect trade secrets amid intensifying AI talent competition. Open-source AI has become mainstream in production, with capability gaps to closed-source models narrowing, though deployment challenges persist. Researchers detected helium in the atmosphere of rocky exoplanet LHS 1140 b in the habitable zone, marking a milestone in the search for extraterrestrial life. LM Studio launched Bionic, an AI agent for open-source models with local data processing and voice transcription. Developers reported fatigue from LLM-assisted programming due to lost sense of accomplishment and increased cognitive burden from code review. Pebble Time 2 smartwatches began shipping

title: 三次抽不中H-1B被迫回国！31岁留美硕士自述：“反向文化冲击”比想象中更猛烈… | 原文
content: A 31-year-old Chinese master's graduate, Charlie Fang, returned to China in 2024 after failing to secure an H-1B visa in three consecutive lotteries. He describes experiencing severe "reverse culture shock" upon returning to his hometown of Nanjing, finding reintegration more difficult than anticipated. His story highlights the challenging transition many Chinese professionals face when forced to abandon U.S. careers due to immigration barriers.

title: 留学生天塌了？美国DHS发布王炸新规！D/S、Day1 CPT、二硕恐成历史，宽限期直接砍半 | 原文
content: US DHS issued final rules for F-1 students and J-1 scholars, effective September 15, 2026. Key changes include restricting Duration of Status (D/S), limiting Day-1 CPT and second master's degrees, and halving grace periods. The regulations, under development since 2020, significantly tighten immigration requirements for international students and exchange visitors in the United States.

title: 微软 CEO 批评 Anthropic 对 Fable 模型的内容管控过于严苛
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella criticized partner Anthropic's Fable AI model for overly strict content restrictions, including unexplained refusals and outdated model responses. Microsoft's $5 billion investment in Anthropic includes Azure cloud commitments. Nadella advocated for cost-effective enterprise custom AI models using internal data, highlighting Microsoft's Azure AI Foundry with 11,000+ models. He questioned the economics of only two companies controlling token computing resources. Microsoft shares have declined 17% this year amid investor concerns about AI coding tools impacting its business, while the Nasdaq rose 11%.

title: OpenAI 承认 GPT-5.6 Codex 存在误删文件问题，建议用户关闭高权限模式
content: OpenAI confirmed that GPT-5.6-powered Codex may accidentally delete files in users' home directories when "full access mode" is enabled, sandbox protection is disabled, and auto-review is turned off. The company is implementing fixes including updated prompts and stronger safeguards, and plans to release a detailed incident report. Users are advised to disable high-privilege mode and use secure environments. The recently launched Codex Micro hardware control panel is sold out.
eventKey: openai-gpt-5-codex-存在误删文件问题-建议用户关闭高权限模式

title: 影视飓风开卖 AI 课程：一夜销量超 10 万份 单日营收 500 万
content: Chinese tech content creator "影视飓风" (Tim's Media Storm), with over 40 million followers, launched a 49-yuan AI practical course through platform TapNow. It sold over 100,000 copies on launch day, generating approximately 4.9 million yuan in revenue. However, reviews were mixed, with criticism focused on templated content. The 16-lesson course covers AI creation basics to advanced topics. The creator previously achieved similar sales with a video editing course at the same price.

title: The cost of saying yes has changed
content: AI coding tools have shifted the primary cost of small feature requests from writing code to debating whether to write it. Teams now spend more time in speculative discussions than implementation would take. The smarter approach is using AI to quickly generate constrained prototype patches as evidence, enabling faster, better-informed human judgments about true ownership costs. The key skill becomes rapidly pricing uncertainty—knowing when to try, when to review, and when to refuse based on concrete artifacts rather than abstract arguments.
eventKey: cost-saying-yes-has-changed
normalizedTitle: the cost of saying yes has changed
